theme_and_archetype.vibe: Warm Luxury / Intellectual Expressive - Confident, ambitious, bright, deeply personal, and socially conscious.
theme_and_archetype.design_philosophy: Fusion of high-end premium aesthetics with energetic, warm feminine touches. Not generic corporate, not aggressively cyberpunk. It strikes a balance between 'elegant professional' and 'passionate builder'.

typography.font_pairings_reasoning: Outfit provides a geometric, elegant, and youthful confidence for headings, escaping the standard 'Inter' look. Manrope provides extreme clarity and a premium tech-forward aesthetic for body copy.

hierarchy.h1: text-5xl md:text-6xl lg:text-[4rem] tracking-tighter font-black leading-none

gradients.hero_glow: radial-gradient(circle at top right, rgba(255,107,107,0.15), transparent 40%)

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Generous spacing. Use p-8, p-12, or p-16 for section padding to allow breathing room.
layout_and_spacing.bento_grid: Used for Skills & Achievements. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 lg:grid-cols-12 with gap-6.
layout_and_spacing.glassmorphism: Apple variant: backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#120D1A]/60 border border-white/10 shadow-2xl. Used for sticky nav, modals, and premium cards.

motion_and_interactions.scroll: MANDATORY: Use Lenis for momentum-based smooth scrolling.
motion_and_interactions.hero_carousel: Framer Motion 'AnimatePresence' for vertically sliding text strings in the hero.
motion_and_interactions.timeline: Staggered GSAP/Framer Motion reveal. A vertical line that 'draws' itself as the user scrolls, lighting up nodes when they enter the viewport.
motion_and_interactions.hover_effects: Cards lift (-translate-y-1) with an expanded shadow and subtle border color shift. Buttons feature a magnetic or scale effect.
motion_and_interactions.parallax: Subtle parallax on abstract background blobs to create depth.

sections_breakdown.nav: Sticky glassmorphism header. Logo left, links center, 'Resume' CTA right.
sections_breakdown.hero: Mission-first layout. Left: Large H1, dynamic text carousel ('Data Analysis', 'AI', 'Technology for Social Good'). Button: 'Explore My Journey ↓'. Right: Confident portrait within a custom geometric frame (e.g., squircle) with a subtle glowing border.
sections_breakdown.vision: Emotional center. Large expressive typography. Focus on human-centric technology. Abstract coral/plum gradient floating in the background.
sections_breakdown.journey: Interactive timeline. Left border or center line. Alternating staggered items. Dark mode specific styling with glowing dots on active states.
sections_breakdown.skills: Bento Grid cards. NO progress bars. Grouped by 'Programming', 'Data', 'Soft Skills'. Use Phosphor/Lucide icons. Hover reveals subtle accent gradients.
sections_breakdown.projects: Premium large cards. Image on top with max overlay bg-black/30. Content below in dark glass card. Includes description, tech stack pills, GitHub, and Demo links.
sections_breakdown.achievements: Minimalist stat cards with giant numbers in Outfit font.
sections_breakdown.certificates: Masonry/Grid layout. Filter pills at the top (Programming, Data Analytics, Leadership). Clicking a certificate opens a Shadcn Dialog (modal preview).
sections_breakdown.contact: Large, bold section. Email, LinkedIn, GitHub links. Resume download button. Footer quote: 'Technology becomes meaningful when it improves human lives.' typed out elegantly.

component_strategy.structure: Raw HTML/Tailwind for expansive, creative layouts (Hero, Vision).
component_strategy.interactive: Shadcn UI (Dialog, Tabs, Cards) customized heavily to match the dark luxury aesthetic.

accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: MANDATORY: Add 'data-testid' to all interactive elements (buttons, links, filters, form inputs). e.g., data-testid='explore-journey-btn', data-testid='cert-filter-programming'.
accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure text over gradients meets APCA standards. Use text-shadow over images if contrast is compromised.

hero_portrait.description: Confident woman portrait in dark aesthetic, ideal for the Hero section photo frame.

abstract_backgrounds.description: Abstract dark purple to coral gradient. Use as a low-opacity background layer behind Vision or Contact sections.

project_thumbnails.description: Data analytics dashboard screen. Ideal for data/analytics featured project.
Abstract data visualization graph. Ideal for an AI/Research project.
Code and laptop visual. Ideal for a software engineering project.

certificate_placeholders.description: Placeholder image for certificates gallery if actual certificate images are not provided.
